backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of the Proxy page feature, listing the affected files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short descriptions summarizing each file's role and recent changes in the Cheetah 1.0 app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the app's design token system (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Cheetah 1.0 app, loading Puter.js, CodeMirror, Google CSE scripts, and mounting the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing page navigation, tab state, and a panic mode overlay with keyboard shortcut support, rendering all pages including the new ProxyLinks page.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/CodeE: Code editor tab using CodeMirror with support for HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Python, featuring run/preview, save to localStorage, and a live iframe preview.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/Prese: Presentation builder tab with slide list management, per-slide title/body/color editing, keyboard-navigable fullscreen presentation mode, and localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/Websi: A drag-and-drop style website builder tab that lets users add, edit, reorder, and preview HTML components (header, text, image, button) with persistent localStorage state.
frontend/src/components/common/LoadingSp: A simple animated CSS spinner component with configurable size (sm/md/lg) and an optional text label.
frontend/src/components/common/ProxyInfo: An expandable info panel that displays proxy configuration details (CORS proxy routes, etc.) with collapsible sections, rendered as an overlay below the header.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: The top application header displaying the Cheetah logo, branding, a SECURE status badge, and a panic button with keyboard shortcut support.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: A vertical sidebar navigation component rendering icon+label buttons for all app pages (home, games, AI, code, quickopen, education, proxy) with keyboard shortcut hints.
frontend/src/components/tabs/TabBar.tsx: A horizontal browser-style tab bar that renders open tabs with close buttons and a new-tab button, supporting active tab highlighting and overflow scrolling.
Renders the content area for a single browser tab, showing a welcome screen, an error state with retry/open-in-new-window options, or a proxied iframe for the loaded URL.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts: Generic React hook that syncs state with localStorage, supporting functional updates and gracefully handling JSON parse/stringify errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no exports, indicating no backend queries are needed for this frontend-only app.
frontend/src/hooks/useTabs.ts: Hook managing browser-like tab state (open, close, navigate, proxy fallback chain) with persistence via localStorage, including URL normalization and multiple CORS proxy strategies.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining an always-dark amethyst/violet theme using OKLCH CSS variables, Tailwind layers, glassmorphism utilities, animated gradient backgrounds, and custom scrollbar styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AIAssistant.tsx: AI homework assistant page that sends subject-tagged questions to Puter.js AI, renders markdown-formatted answers, and persists a history of Q&A pairs in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/CodeEditorPage.tsx: Page component with three sub-tabs (Code Editor, Presentation Builder, Website Builder) rendered via a styled tab bar that switches between the corresponding child components.
frontend/src/pages/Education.tsx: Renders an education page with a built-in quiz system covering Math, ELA, Science, and other subjects, tracking streaks and scores. Includes a static question bank with multiple-choice questions, explanations, and subject-based filtering.
frontend/src/pages/Games.tsx: Displays a grid of educational game site cards (e.g., Math Playground, Khan Academy, Scratch) with links that either open external URLs or navigate to internal pages like the Education hub.
frontend/src/pages/HomeSearch.tsx: Provides a browser-like home/search page with an address bar, back/forward/refresh controls, and an iframe for displaying proxied content. Also handles proxy error states and offers a retry or open-in-new-window fallback.
frontend/src/pages/ProxyLinks.tsx: Renders a list of proxy service cards (ProxySite, ProxyOrb, ProxyProxy) with descriptions and launch buttons that open the selected proxy in the browser. Highlights a primary/active proxy with distinct styling.
frontend/src/pages/QuickOpen.tsx: Shows a quick-access grid of popular sites (TikTok, YouTube, ChatGPT, etc.) as styled cards that open the respective URL through the proxy when clicked.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with custom fonts (JetBrains Mono, Rajdhani), oklch-based color tokens (amethyst, violet, magenta palettes, and semantic UI colors), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the 'Cheetah 1.0' project, recording existing features (Education page, Proxy page with three proxy services) and a pending action request to create a Proxy page listing three proxy URLs.
